title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at PhonePe
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? PhonePe in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About PhonePe:
PhonePe is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PhonePe!
